leadText: Poison Sting (Japanese: どくばり Poison Needle) is a damage-dealing Poison-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I 1.2 Generation II onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.4 Generation IX 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] Poison Sting does damage and has a 20% chance of poisoning the target. Generation II onwards [ edit | edit source ] Poison Sting now has a 30% chance to poison the target. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 20 Agile Strong Power 30 20 40 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 50% 50% 100% Turns 5 3 7 ? ? Inflicts the target with poison Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 30 36 Cooldown 6s Move wind-up time 10 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect Chance 30% — — May poison the target.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad A Poison -type attack. Has a one-in-five chance of leaving the target with the lingering effects of poison. Stad2 A Poison -type attack. Has a one-in-three chance of leaving the target poisoned. G S C An attack that may poison the target. R S E Colo XD A toxic attack with barbs, etc., that may poison. FR LG The foe is stabbed with a toxic barb, etc. It may poison the foe. D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is stabbed with a poisonous barb of some sort. It may also poison the target. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user stabs the target with a poisonous stinger. This may also poison the target. S V The user stabs the target with a poisonous stinger to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. ZA The user attacks by stabbing targets with a poisonous stinger. This may also leave targets poisoned.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target. It may also leave the target poisoned, damaging it over several turns. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. It may also afflict the targeted enemy with a Poisoned status condition, which causes periodic damage. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで どくじょうたいにして いっていターンごとに ダメージを あたえる Conq. Sting the enemy with a poisoned needle. May poison the target. MD GtI It damages an enemy. It could also cause the Poisoned status condition. With the Poisoned status, the enemy keeps taking damage and can't restore its HP naturally. S MD It damages an enemy. It could also make the enemy poisoned.
